mapper.update: update member set member_password = #{member_password}, member_nickname = #{member_nickname}, member_phone = #{member_phone}, updated_at = SYSDATE() where member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.select: select member_password from member where member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.insert: insert into member(member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_phone, member_role_type, default_delivery_address, member_status, created_at, updated_at) values(#{member_email}, #{member_password}, #{member_nickname}, #{member_phone}, #{member_role_type}, #{default_delivery_address}, #{member_status}, SYSDATE(), SYSDATE())
